meta_title: For Founders: design with AI to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Design with AI to Solve No Portfolio (Beginner)
content.seo_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome the no-portfolio trap. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your SaaS MVP fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth for AI-enabled founders. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid UI generation and Claude Code for backend orchestration, you can deploy a high-fidelity, functional MVP in hours. Focus on solving a specific niche problem rather than showcasing generic design skills to capture real revenue.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the weight of 'no portfolio' hanging over your head like a lead anchor. Clients and investors want to see what you’ve built, but you’re stuck in the infinite loop of needing experience to get the work, and needing the work to get the experience. The industry standard has shifted; legacy design portfolios are dying, replaced by the velocity of AI-driven execution.

Today, we break that cycle. You don't need a decade of agency experience to ship a premium product. By mastering the synergy between Antigravity’s rapid UI generation and Claude Code’s autonomous engineering, you transform from a 'beginner' into a high-leverage product engine capable of building in days what once took months.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Niche
steps.description: Identify a micro-SaaS problem where design is a blocker. Don't build a generic dashboard; build a tool that automates one specific task for a specific user persona.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-converting landing page layout for a SaaS tool that automates [insert your niche] for small business owners, focusing on clarity, trust, and a strong CTA.

steps.title: Generate Functional UI Components
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the core UI shell. Focus on responsive, clean design that looks professional without custom CSS bloat.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modern Tailwind CSS component library for a user dashboard including a navbar, data summary cards, and a sidebar navigation.

steps.title: Configure the Backend Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to connect your front-end to a mock API or Supabase instance to simulate real data interactions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean backend service in Node.js that handles user authentication and retrieves mock data for the dashboard summary cards.

steps.title: Iterative Refinement Loop
steps.description: Review the MVP with Claude Code to optimize for performance and accessibility. Iterate based on what a real user would actually click.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current dashboard code and optimize for performance. Suggest three improvements to increase user conversion rates.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push your code to Vercel or Netlify to make the project live. A live URL is your new portfolio piece.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment script and a README.md file that explains the value proposition of this SaaS tool for potential users.

pro_tips: Stop building generic clones; always include one 'hidden' feature that solves a specific pain point for your niche.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write it; this makes your GitHub repo look like it was built by a senior engineer.
Prioritize 'Mobile First' in Antigravity; 70% of initial product feedback comes from users checking your link on their phones.
Attach a Loom video to your live demo; showing a human explaining the product is worth 100 lines of perfect code.
Treat your first MVP as a 'throwaway' asset; the goal is to practice the build-deploy-feedback cycle, not to achieve perfection.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, treat it as a cold-outreach asset. Send the link to 50 potential users in your niche, gather feedback, and iterate the product using the same AI workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a developer. Your speed of execution is your greatest competitive advantage in the AI era. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
